name: emdash-template-switcher
description: Live, admin-switchable site templates for EmDash CMS. A shadcn-style CLI that scaffolds a template registry + a minimal template into your EmDash/Astro site.
author: Huankai Chen <huankaichen@hotmail.com>

scripts.check: node --check bin/cli.mjs && node --check src/init.mjs && node --check src/add.mjs && node --check src/utils.mjs
